---
title: "Simon Yan"
about:
  template: jolla
  image: profile.jpg # 如果你有照片，放一张在这里，没有就删掉这行
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com/in/your-profile
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/hy86652
---

## Welcome to my Portfolio

I am a Data Analyst specializing in **Assurance Artificial Intelligence Technology** and Technical Analysis. 

My work focuses on leveraging R and Python to ensure the robustness of AI systems and identifying patterns in financial markets.

### Core Competencies:
* **AI Assurance**: Model validation, bias detection, and quality control.
* **Data Visualization**: Advanced plotting using `ggplot2` and `plotly`.
* **Trading Analytics**: Technical analysis and options strategies.
